name: trace-adapter harness matrix
description: Evaluate exported Agent SDK and IDE-agent runs after normalizing them into the trace contract.

instruction_variants.instructions: Evaluate the first selected tool from an exported trace after adapter normalization.
instruction_variants.name: exported_trace

tools.avoid_when: Avoid for a single known file read, a single exact text search, or a simple filename glob.
tools.name: Task
quality_checks: Use when the exported run needs multi-file synthesis.
tools.use_when: Use for broad investigation, mapping, summarization, or synthesis across unknown files.

cases.name: investigate trace review flow
cases.task: Investigate how trace review scoring works across this repository and summarize the key files and control flow.

cases.name: map model matrix implementation
cases.task: Map how the model matrix runner is implemented across the repository and summarize the main extension points.

value_bar.claim: Trace-adapter harnesses add value when exported runs can be normalized and evaluated with the same matrix checks as provider tool calls.

baseline.source: raw event exports before adapter normalization

candidate.source: harness_trace_adapters matrix with agent_sdk_trace and cursor_trace

adversarial_review.challenge: Both named harnesses must pass both realistic cases through the trace_fixture provider.
